name: .geminirc — Standard Setup
description: Standard Gemini CLI configuration with Gemini 2.5 Pro.
content:
# Gemini CLI Configuration

model: gemini-2.5-pro
temperature: 0.7
max_output_tokens: 8192

# Project settings
workspace: ./
auto_save: true

# Git integration
git:
  auto_commit: false
  commit_prefix: "[gemini]"

# File handling
ignore:
  - node_modules/
  - .git/
  - dist/
  - "*.log"

# UI preferences
streaming: true
color_output: true

name: .geminirc — Thinking Mode
description: Gemini configuration optimized for complex reasoning with thinking mode enabled.
content:
# Gemini CLI — Thinking Mode

model: gemini-2.5-pro
thinking_mode: true
temperature: 0.3
max_output_tokens: 16384

# Enhanced reasoning
reasoning:
  show_thought_process: true
  reflection_depth: deep
  verify_output: true

# Code quality
code_standards:
  strict_types: true
  best_practices: true
  security_checks: true

# Tools
tools:
  code_execution: true
  web_search: true
  file_operations: true

# Safety
safety_settings:
  harassment: block_medium_and_above
  hate_speech: block_medium_and_above
  sexually_explicit: block_medium_and_above
  dangerous_content: block_medium_and_above
